subcodes.first_line: O Attar! Scatter thy musk-laden fragrance to every region, and breathe in the soul-reviving breeze from the source of divine favours [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عطار نفحه مشکبار بر اقطار نثار کن و نسیم جانپرور از مهب عنایت استنشاق نما
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @growth of the Cause, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
